name: Den Workspace - Editorial Platform - All in One

parameters.content:
DEN'S WORKSPACE — ALL-IN-ONE EDITORIAL PIPELINE

Required n8n environment variables:
DW_RSS_FEED_URL, DENS_SITE_URL, N8N_INTEGRATION_SECRET,
SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY,
TELEGRAM_APPROVAL_CHAT_ID, TELEGRAM_APPROVAL_TOPIC_RU,
TELEGRAM_APPROVAL_TOPIC_EN, TELEGRAM_PUBLIC_CHAT_ID.

After import select OpenAI credentials on “AI Editorial Rewrite” and Telegram credentials on both Telegram nodes. The same N8N_INTEGRATION_SECRET must exist in the website .env.local / deployment secrets.

parameters.text: ={{ [ $('Only New Articles').item.json.source.imageUrl || '', '' + $('Parse + Sign Editorial').item.json.payload.title.replace(/[<>&]/g, '') + '', $('Parse + Sign Editorial').item.json.payload.summary, '', 'Source: ' + $('Only New Articles').item.json.source.canonicalUrl ].filter(Boolean).join('\n\n') }}

parameters.content: Publication jobs are created atomically when an article is approved. The publisher polls Supabase every minute, publishes site/Telegram jobs, then reports the result to the website. X, Reddit and Threads can be added later as extra Switch outputs.
